questionHtml: Outline how aspirin can be chemically modified to increase its solubility in water.
markschemeHtml:
convert to a salt
OR
react with sodium hydroxide  [✔]

 

Note: Accept other reactions forming soluble salts.

Accept “to ionize” but not “more polar”.

meta.title: Outline how aspirin can be chemically modified to increase its solubility in water.
